ddls:
CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "zcta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ZCTA */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_group" TEXT /* Borough group (e.g., Manhattan, Brooklyn) */,
  "covid_case_count" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases */,
  "covid_case_rate" REAL /* COVID-19 case rate per 100,000 people */,
  "pop_denominator" REAL /* Population denominator used to calculate case rate */,
  "covid_death_count" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 deaths */,
  "covid_death_rate" REAL /* COVID-19 death rate per 100,000 people */,
  "percent_positive" REAL /* Percentage of positive COVID-19 tests */,
  "total_covid_tests" INTEGER /* Total number of COVID-19 tests */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the ZCTA */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the ZCTA */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the COVID-19 data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the COVID-19 data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zcta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_neighborhood_name FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_name") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_group" TEXT /* Borough group (e.g., Manhattan, Brooklyn) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_type" TEXT /* Type of neighborhood (e.g., residential, commercial, mixed-use) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_group FOREIGN KEY ("borough_group") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "borough_population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case */,
  "zcta_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ZCTA where the case was reported */,
  "case_date" TEXT /* Date the case was reported */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of case (e.g., confirmed, probable) */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms exhibited by the patient */,
  "exposure_location" TEXT /* Location of exposure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_cases_zcta_id FOREIGN KEY ("zcta_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("zcta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_deaths" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death */,
  "zcta_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ZCTA where the death was reported */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date the death was reported */,
  "patient_age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "patient_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "underlying_conditions" TEXT /* Underlying health conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_deaths_zcta_id FOREIGN KEY ("zcta_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("zcta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "zcta_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ZCTA where the test was performed */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., PCR, antigen, antibody) */,
  "test_result_date" TEXT /* Date the test result was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_tests_zcta_id FOREIGN KEY ("zcta_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("zcta_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "zcta_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ZCTA being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_zcta_id FOREIGN KEY ("zcta_id") REFERENCES covid_data ("zcta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_filters" TEXT /* Filters applied to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borough_neighborhoods" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id", "neighborhood_id")
)
